name: The Abyssal Maze
short_description: Trapped in a nightmarish labyrinth, you have only two goals, find the ancient book and escape. But the walls are alive with echoes, and the monsters that stalk the corridors never sleep.
detailed_description:
🕯️ About the Game

You wake up inside a twisting, suffocating maze with only two objectives: find the ancient book hidden somewhere in the darkness… and get out alive.
The halls echo with distant footsteps, and whatever lurks in the shadows never seems to rest.

The Abyssal Maze is a three-stage horror experience designed to push your nerves and patience to their limit. You have no weapons, no special abilities, just your instincts and the hope that you’re not too late.

🔦 Gameplay Features

Three Escalating Stages
Each maze is bigger, darker, and more distorted than the last. By the time you reach the third stage, every step feels like a gamble. Only the most determined players make it out.

Stealth, Not Strength
The creatures hunting you can’t be fought. All you can do is run when you must and hide.

Hidden Books and Secrets
Every stage contains a mysterious book. Find it and the exit to push deeper into the maze’s nightmares.

Heavy, Unsettling Atmosphere
Oppressive sound design and unpredictable enemy movement keep you tense from the first step to the last.

Do you have what it takes to escape the Abyssal Maze…
or will the walls claim you like all the others who never found the way out?
